subtitle.en: The Vimshottari Dasha system assigns planetary periods based on the Moon's birth nakshatra lord
subtitle.hi: विंशोत्तरी दशा पद्धति चन्द्रमा के जन्म नक्षत्र स्वामी के आधार पर ग्रह काल निर्धारित करती है
subtitle.ta: விம்சோத்தரி தசை முறை பிறப்பு நட்சத்திர அதிபதியின் அடிப்படையில் கிரக காலங்களை நிர்ணயிக்கிறது
subtitle.te: విమ్శోత్తరి దశ పద్ధతి చంద్రుని జన్మ నక్షత్ర అధిపతి ఆధారంగా గ్రహ కాలాలను నిర్ణయిస్తుంది
subtitle.bn: বিংশোত্তরী দশা পদ্ধতি চন্দ্রের জন্ম নক্ষত্র অধিপতির ভিত্তিতে গ্রহ কাল নির্ধারণ করে
subtitle.kn: ವಿಂಶೋತ್ತರಿ ದಶೆ ಪದ್ಧತಿ ಚಂದ್ರನ ಜನ್ಮ ನಕ್ಷತ್ರ ಅಧಿಪತಿಯ ಆಧಾರದ ಮೇಲೆ ಗ್ರಹ ಅವಧಿಗಳನ್ನು ನಿಗದಿಪಡಿಸುತ್ತದೆ
subtitle.mr: विंशोत्तरी दशा पद्धत चंद्राच्या जन्म नक्षत्र स्वामीवर आधारित ग्रह काळ ठरवते
subtitle.gu: વિંશોત્તરી દશા પદ્ધતિ ચંદ્રના જન્મ નક્ષત્ર સ્વામીના આધારે ગ્રહ કાળ નક્કી કરે છે
subtitle.mai: विंशोत्तरी दशा पद्धति चन्द्रमाक जन्म नक्षत्र स्वामीक आधार पर ग्रह काल निर्धारित करैत अछि

question.en: In the Vimshottari system, which planet rules Ashwini, Magha, and Mula?
question.hi: विंशोत्तरी पद्धति में अश्विनी, मघा और मूल का स्वामी कौन-सा ग्रह है?
question.ta: In the Vimshottari system, which planet rules Ashwini, Magha, and Mula?
question.te: In the Vimshottari system, which planet rules Ashwini, Magha, and Mula?
question.bn: In the Vimshottari system, which planet rules Ashwini, Magha, and Mula?
question.kn: In the Vimshottari system, which planet rules Ashwini, Magha, and Mula?
question.mr: विंशोत्तरी पद्धति में अश्विनी, मघा और मूल का स्वामी कौन-सा ग्रह है?
question.gu: In the Vimshottari system, which planet rules Ashwini, Magha, and Mula?
question.mai: विंशोत्तरी प्रणाली मे, कोन ग्रह अश्विनी, मघा आ मूलक स्वामी अछि?

explanation.en: Ketu rules the 1st, 10th, and 19th nakshatras: Ashwini, Magha, and Mula. In the Vimshottari sequence, Ketu comes first and each planet rules 3 nakshatras spaced 9 apart.
explanation.hi: केतु 1ले, 10वें और 19वें नक्षत्रों का शासक है: अश्विनी, मघा और मूल। विंशोत्तरी अनुक्रम में केतु प्रथम है और प्रत्येक ग्रह 9 के अन्तराल पर 3 नक्षत्रों का शासक है।
explanation.ta: Ketu rules the 1st, 10th, and 19th nakshatras: Ashwini, Magha, and Mula. In the Vimshottari sequence, Ketu comes first and each planet rules 3 nakshatras spaced 9 apart.

explanation.mr: केतु 1ले, 10वें और 19वें नक्षत्रों का शासक है: अश्विनी, मघा और मूल। विंशोत्तरी अनुक्रम में केतु प्रथम है और प्रत्येक ग्रह 9 के अन्तराल पर 3 नक्षत्रों का शासक है।
explanation.gu: Ketu rules the 1st, 10th, and 19th nakshatras: Ashwini, Magha, and Mula. In the Vimshottari sequence, Ketu comes first and each planet rules 3 nakshatras spaced 9 apart.
explanation.mai: केतु पहिल, दसम् आ १९म नक्षत्रक स्वामी अछि: अश्विनी, मघा आ मूल. विंशोत्तरी क्रम मे, केतु पहिने अबैत अछि आ प्रत्येक ग्रह ९ स्थानक दूरी पर ३ नक्षत्रक स्वामी अछि.

question.en: What is the total duration of the Vimshottari Mahadasha cycle?
question.hi: विंशोत्तरी महादशा चक्र की कुल अवधि कितनी है?
question.ta: What is the total duration of the Vimshottari Mahadasha cycle?
question.te: What is the total duration of the Vimshottari Mahadasha cycle?
question.bn: What is the total duration of the Vimshottari Mahadasha cycle?
question.kn: What is the total duration of the Vimshottari Mahadasha cycle?
question.mr: विंशोत्तरी महादशा चक्र की कुल अवधि कितनी है?
question.gu: What is the total duration of the Vimshottari Mahadasha cycle?
question.mai: विंशोत्तरी महादशा चक्रक कुल अवधि की अछि?

explanation.en: The total is 120 years: Ketu(7) + Venus(20) + Sun(6) + Moon(10) + Mars(7) + Rahu(18) + Jupiter(16) + Saturn(19) + Mercury(17) = 120. "Vimshottari" literally means "of 120."
explanation.ta: The total is 120 years: Ketu(7) + Venus(20) + Sun(6) + Moon(10) + Mars(7) + Rahu(18) + Jupiter(16) + Saturn(19) + Mercury(17) = 120. "Vimshottari" literally means "of 120."
explanation.te: The total is 120 years: Ketu(7) + Venus(20) + Sun(6) + Moon(10) + Mars(7) + Rahu(18) + Jupiter(16) + Saturn(19) + Mercury(17) = 120. "Vimshottari" literally means "of 120."
explanation.bn: The total is 120 years: Ketu(7) + Venus(20) + Sun(6) + Moon(10) + Mars(7) + Rahu(18) + Jupiter(16) + Saturn(19) + Mercury(17) = 120. "Vimshottari" literally means "of 120."
explanation.kn: The total is 120 years: Ketu(7) + Venus(20) + Sun(6) + Moon(10) + Mars(7) + Rahu(18) + Jupiter(16) + Saturn(19) + Mercury(17) = 120. "Vimshottari" literally means "of 120."
explanation.gu: The total is 120 years: Ketu(7) + Venus(20) + Sun(6) + Moon(10) + Mars(7) + Rahu(18) + Jupiter(16) + Saturn(19) + Mercury(17) = 120. "Vimshottari" literally means "of 120."

question.en: A person born with Moon in Hasta always starts life with a full 10-year Moon Mahadasha.
question.hi: हस्त नक्षत्र में चन्द्रमा वाले व्यक्ति का जीवन सदैव पूर्ण 10-वर्षीय चन्द्र महादशा से आरम्भ होता है।
question.ta: A person born with Moon in Hasta always starts life with a full 10-year Moon Mahadasha.
question.te: A person born with Moon in Hasta always starts life with a full 10-year Moon Mahadasha.
question.bn: A person born with Moon in Hasta always starts life with a full 10-year Moon Mahadasha.
question.kn: A person born with Moon in Hasta always starts life with a full 10-year Moon Mahadasha.
question.mr: हस्त नक्षत्र में चन्द्रमा वाले व्यक्ति का जीवन सदैव पूर्ण 10-वर्षीय चन्द्र महादशा से आरम्भ होता है।
question.gu: A person born with Moon in Hasta always starts life with a full 10-year Moon Mahadasha.
question.mai: हस्त नक्षत्र मे चंद्रक संग जन्म लेनिहार व्यक्ति सँधिए पूर्ण १० वर्षक चंद्र महादशाक संग जीवन शुरू करैत अछि.

explanation.en: False. Only if the Moon is at exactly 160° (the start of Hasta) would the full 10-year dasha remain. Since the Moon is almost always partway through the nakshatra, only the remaining portion is available at birth.
explanation.hi: असत्य। केवल यदि चन्द्रमा ठीक 160° (हस्त के आरम्भ) पर हो तभी पूर्ण 10-वर्षीय दशा शेष होगी। चूँकि चन्द्रमा प्रायः नक्षत्र में कुछ दूर तक चुका होता है, जन्म पर केवल शेष अंश उपलब्ध होता है।
explanation.ta: False. Only if the Moon is at exactly 160° (the start of Hasta) would the full 10-year dasha remain. Since the Moon is almost always partway through the nakshatra, only the remaining portion is available at birth.
explanation.te: False. Only if the Moon is at exactly 160° (the start of Hasta) would the full 10-year dasha remain. Since the Moon is almost always partway through the nakshatra, only the remaining portion is available at birth.
explanation.bn: False. Only if the Moon is at exactly 160° (the start of Hasta) would the full 10-year dasha remain. Since the Moon is almost always partway through the nakshatra, only the remaining portion is available at birth.
explanation.kn: False. Only if the Moon is at exactly 160° (the start of Hasta) would the full 10-year dasha remain. Since the Moon is almost always partway through the nakshatra, only the remaining portion is available at birth.
explanation.mr: असत्य। केवल यदि चन्द्रमा ठीक 160° (हस्त के आरम्भ) पर हो तभी पूर्ण 10-वर्षीय दशा शेष होगी। चूँकि चन्द्रमा प्रायः नक्षत्र में कुछ दूर तक चुका होता है, जन्म पर केवल शेष अंश उपलब्ध होता है।
explanation.gu: False. Only if the Moon is at exactly 160° (the start of Hasta) would the full 10-year dasha remain. Since the Moon is almost always partway through the nakshatra, only the remaining portion is available at birth.
explanation.mai: गलत. मात्र जँ चंद्र ठीक १६०° पर (हस्तक शुरुआत) होए तखनहि पूर्ण १० वर्षक दशा शेष रहत. चूंकि चंद्र प्रायः सँधिए नक्षत्रक मध्य मे रहैत अछि, जन्मक समय मात्र शेष भाग उपलब्ध रहैत अछि.

question.en: If Moon is at 167.3° in Hasta (160°-173.33°), what percentage of Moon dasha has elapsed?
question.hi: यदि चन्द्रमा 167.3° पर हस्त (160°-173.33°) में है, तो चन्द्र दशा का कितना प्रतिशत बीत चुका है?
question.ta: If Moon is at 167.3° in Hasta (160°-173.33°), what percentage of Moon dasha has elapsed?
question.te: If Moon is at 167.3° in Hasta (160°-173.33°), what percentage of Moon dasha has elapsed?
question.bn: If Moon is at 167.3° in Hasta (160°-173.33°), what percentage of Moon dasha has elapsed?
question.kn: If Moon is at 167.3° in Hasta (160°-173.33°), what percentage of Moon dasha has elapsed?
question.mr: यदि चन्द्रमा 167.3° पर हस्त (160°-173.33°) में है, तो चन्द्र दशा का कितना प्रतिशत बीत चुका है?
question.gu: If Moon is at 167.3° in Hasta (160°-173.33°), what percentage of Moon dasha has elapsed?
question.mai: जँ चंद्र हस्त मे १६७.३° पर (१६०°-१७३.३३°) अछि, त चंद्र दशाक केतेक प्रतिशत बीत गेल अछि?

explanation.en: Elapsed = (167.3 - 160) / 13.333 = 7.3 / 13.333 = 0.5475 = 54.75%. Since 54.75% of the nakshatra is consumed, 54.75% of the Moon dasha period has elapsed.
explanation.ta: Elapsed = (167.3 - 160) / 13.333 = 7.3 / 13.333 = 0.5475 = 54.75%. Since 54.75% of the nakshatra is consumed, 54.75% of the Moon dasha period has elapsed.
explanation.te: Elapsed = (167.3 - 160) / 13.333 = 7.3 / 13.333 = 0.5475 = 54.75%. Since 54.75% of the nakshatra is consumed, 54.75% of the Moon dasha period has elapsed.
explanation.bn: Elapsed = (167.3 - 160) / 13.333 = 7.3 / 13.333 = 0.5475 = 54.75%. Since 54.75% of the nakshatra is consumed, 54.75% of the Moon dasha period has elapsed.
explanation.kn: Elapsed = (167.3 - 160) / 13.333 = 7.3 / 13.333 = 0.5475 = 54.75%. Since 54.75% of the nakshatra is consumed, 54.75% of the Moon dasha period has elapsed.
explanation.gu: Elapsed = (167.3 - 160) / 13.333 = 7.3 / 13.333 = 0.5475 = 54.75%. Since 54.75% of the nakshatra is consumed, 54.75% of the Moon dasha period has elapsed.

question.en: Following Moon dasha, what is the next Mahadasha in the Vimshottari sequence?
question.hi: चन्द्र दशा के बाद विंशोत्तरी अनुक्रम में अगली महादशा कौन-सी है?
question.ta: Following Moon dasha, what is the next Mahadasha in the Vimshottari sequence?
question.te: Following Moon dasha, what is the next Mahadasha in the Vimshottari sequence?
question.bn: Following Moon dasha, what is the next Mahadasha in the Vimshottari sequence?
question.kn: Following Moon dasha, what is the next Mahadasha in the Vimshottari sequence?
question.mr: चन्द्र दशा के बाद विंशोत्तरी अनुक्रम में अगली महादशा कौन-सी है?
question.gu: Following Moon dasha, what is the next Mahadasha in the Vimshottari sequence?
question.mai: चंद्र दशाक बाद, विंशोत्तरी क्रम मे कोन अगला महादशा अछि?

explanation.en: The Vimshottari sequence is: Ketu → Venus → Sun → Moon → Mars → Rahu → Jupiter → Saturn → Mercury. After Moon comes Mars (7 years).
explanation.hi: विंशोत्तरी अनुक्रम है: केतु → शुक्र → सूर्य → चन्द्र → मंगल → राहु → बृहस्पति → शनि → बुध। चन्द्र के बाद मंगल (7 वर्ष) आता है।
explanation.ta: The Vimshottari sequence is: Ketu → Venus → Sun → Moon → Mars → Rahu → Jupiter → Saturn → Mercury. After Moon comes Mars (7 years).
explanation.te: The Vimshottari sequence is: Ketu → Venus → Sun → Moon → Mars → Rahu → Jupiter → Saturn → Mercury. After Moon comes Mars (7 years).
explanation.bn: The Vimshottari sequence is: Ketu → Venus → Sun → Moon → Mars → Rahu → Jupiter → Saturn → Mercury. After Moon comes Mars (7 years).
explanation.kn: The Vimshottari sequence is: Ketu → Venus → Sun → Moon → Mars → Rahu → Jupiter → Saturn → Mercury. After Moon comes Mars (7 years).
explanation.mr: विंशोत्तरी अनुक्रम है: केतु → शुक्र → सूर्य → चन्द्र → मंगल → राहु → बृहस्पति → शनि → बुध। चन्द्र के बाद मंगल (7 वर्ष) आता है।
explanation.gu: The Vimshottari sequence is: Ketu → Venus → Sun → Moon → Mars → Rahu → Jupiter → Saturn → Mercury. After Moon comes Mars (7 years).
explanation.mai: विंशोत्तरी क्रम अछि: केतु → शुक्र → सूर्य → चंद्र → मंगल → राहु → गुरु → शनि → बुध. चंद्रक बाद मंगल (७ वर्ष) अबैत अछि.

question.en: Venus has the longest Mahadasha period at 20 years in the Vimshottari system.
question.hi: विंशोत्तरी पद्धति में शुक्र की सबसे लम्बी 20 वर्ष की महादशा है।
question.ta: Venus has the longest Mahadasha period at 20 years in the Vimshottari system.
question.te: Venus has the longest Mahadasha period at 20 years in the Vimshottari system.
question.bn: Venus has the longest Mahadasha period at 20 years in the Vimshottari system.
question.kn: Venus has the longest Mahadasha period at 20 years in the Vimshottari system.
question.mr: विंशोत्तरी पद्धति में शुक्र की सबसे लम्बी 20 वर्ष की महादशा है।
question.gu: Venus has the longest Mahadasha period at 20 years in the Vimshottari system.
question.mai: विंशोत्तरी प्रणाली मे शुक्रक २० वर्षक सभसँ बेसी महादशा अवधि अछि.

explanation.en: True. Venus Mahadasha is 20 years, the longest of all nine. Saturn comes second at 19 years, followed by Rahu at 18, Mercury at 17, and Jupiter at 16. The shortest are Sun at 6 years and Ketu and Mars at 7 each.
explanation.hi: सत्य। शुक्र महादशा 20 वर्ष है, सभी नौ में सबसे लम्बी। शनि 19 वर्ष के साथ दूसरे स्थान पर, फिर राहु 18, बुध 17 और बृहस्पति 16 वर्ष। सबसे छोटी सूर्य 6 वर्ष और केतु व मंगल प्रत्येक 7 वर्ष हैं।
explanation.ta: True. Venus Mahadasha is 20 years, the longest of all nine. Saturn comes second at 19 years, followed by Rahu at 18, Mercury at 17, and Jupiter at 16. The shortest are Sun at 6 years and Ketu and Mars at 7 each.
explanation.te: True. Venus Mahadasha is 20 years, the longest of all nine. Saturn comes second at 19 years, followed by Rahu at 18, Mercury at 17, and Jupiter at 16. The shortest are Sun at 6 years and Ketu and Mars at 7 each.
explanation.bn: True. Venus Mahadasha is 20 years, the longest of all nine. Saturn comes second at 19 years, followed by Rahu at 18, Mercury at 17, and Jupiter at 16. The shortest are Sun at 6 years and Ketu and Mars at 7 each.
explanation.kn: True. Venus Mahadasha is 20 years, the longest of all nine. Saturn comes second at 19 years, followed by Rahu at 18, Mercury at 17, and Jupiter at 16. The shortest are Sun at 6 years and Ketu and Mars at 7 each.
explanation.mr: सत्य। शुक्र महादशा 20 वर्ष है, सभी नौ में सबसे लम्बी। शनि 19 वर्ष के साथ दूसरे स्थान पर, फिर राहु 18, बुध 17 और बृहस्पति 16 वर्ष। सबसे छोटी सूर्य 6 वर्ष और केतु व मंगल प्रत्येक 7 वर्ष हैं।
explanation.gu: True. Venus Mahadasha is 20 years, the longest of all nine. Saturn comes second at 19 years, followed by Rahu at 18, Mercury at 17, and Jupiter at 16. The shortest are Sun at 6 years and Ketu and Mars at 7 each.
explanation.mai: सत्य. शुक्र महादशा २० वर्षक अछि, सभ नौ मे सभसँ बेसी. शनि १९ वर्षक संग दोसर स्थान पर अबैत अछि, ओकर बाद राहु १८, बुध १७, आ गुरु १६. सभसँ कम सूर्य ६ वर्ष आ केतु आ मंगल ७-७ वर्षक अछि.

question.en: How many nakshatras does each planet rule in the Vimshottari system?
question.hi: विंशोत्तरी पद्धति में प्रत्येक ग्रह कितने नक्षत्रों का शासक है?
question.ta: How many nakshatras does each planet rule in the Vimshottari system?
question.te: How many nakshatras does each planet rule in the Vimshottari system?
question.bn: How many nakshatras does each planet rule in the Vimshottari system?

question.mr: विंशोत्तरी पद्धति में प्रत्येक ग्रह कितने नक्षत्रों का शासक है?
question.gu: How many nakshatras does each planet rule in the Vimshottari system?
question.mai: विंशोत्तरी प्रणाली मे प्रत्येक ग्रह केतेक नक्षत्रक स्वामी अछि?

explanation.en: Each of the 9 planets rules exactly 3 nakshatras: 27 / 9 = 3 each. The 3 nakshatras ruled by each planet are spaced 9 positions apart.
explanation.hi: 9 ग्रहों में से प्रत्येक ठीक 3 नक्षत्रों का शासक है: 27 / 9 = प्रत्येक 3। प्रत्येक ग्रह द्वारा शासित 3 नक्षत्र 9 स्थान के अन्तराल पर हैं।
explanation.ta: Each of the 9 planets rules exactly 3 nakshatras: 27 / 9 = 3 each. The 3 nakshatras ruled by each planet are spaced 9 positions apart.
explanation.te: Each of the 9 planets rules exactly 3 nakshatras: 27 / 9 = 3 each. The 3 nakshatras ruled by each planet are spaced 9 positions apart.
explanation.bn: Each of the 9 planets rules exactly 3 nakshatras: 27 / 9 = 3 each. The 3 nakshatras ruled by each planet are spaced 9 positions apart.
explanation.kn: Each of the 9 planets rules exactly 3 nakshatras: 27 / 9 = 3 each. The 3 nakshatras ruled by each planet are spaced 9 positions apart.
explanation.mr: 9 ग्रहों में से प्रत्येक ठीक 3 नक्षत्रों का शासक है: 27 / 9 = प्रत्येक 3। प्रत्येक ग्रह द्वारा शासित 3 नक्षत्र 9 स्थान के अन्तराल पर हैं।
explanation.gu: Each of the 9 planets rules exactly 3 nakshatras: 27 / 9 = 3 each. The 3 nakshatras ruled by each planet are spaced 9 positions apart.
explanation.mai: ९ ग्रह मे सँ प्रत्येक ठीक ३ नक्षत्रक स्वामी अछि: २७ / ९ = ३ प्रत्येक. प्रत्येक ग्रह द्वारा शासित ३ नक्षत्र ९ स्थानक दूरी पर होइत अछि.

question.en: If someone is born in Rohini nakshatra, which planet's Mahadasha starts at birth?
question.hi: यदि कोई रोहिणी नक्षत्र में जन्मे तो जन्म पर किस ग्रह की महादशा आरम्भ होती है?
question.ta: If someone is born in Rohini nakshatra, which planet's Mahadasha starts at birth?
question.te: If someone is born in Rohini nakshatra, which planet's Mahadasha starts at birth?
question.bn: If someone is born in Rohini nakshatra, which planet's Mahadasha starts at birth?
question.kn: If someone is born in Rohini nakshatra, which planet's Mahadasha starts at birth?
question.mr: यदि कोई रोहिणी नक्षत्र में जन्मे तो जन्म पर किस ग्रह की महादशा आरम्भ होती है?
question.gu: If someone is born in Rohini nakshatra, which planet's Mahadasha starts at birth?
question.mai: जँ कोनो व्यक्ति रोहिणी नक्षत्र मे जन्म लेलक अछि, त कोन ग्रहक महादशा जन्मक समय शुरू होइत अछि?

explanation.en: Rohini is the 4th nakshatra, ruled by Moon in the Vimshottari scheme. The sequence: 1-Ketu, 2-Venus, 3-Sun, 4-Moon. So Rohini (4th) = Moon.
explanation.hi: रोहिणी 4था नक्षत्र है, विंशोत्तरी पद्धति में चन्द्र शासित। अनुक्रम: 1-केतु, 2-शुक्र, 3-सूर्य, 4-चन्द्र। अतः रोहिणी (4था) = चन्द्र।
explanation.ta: Rohini is the 4th nakshatra, ruled by Moon in the Vimshottari scheme. The sequence: 1-Ketu, 2-Venus, 3-Sun, 4-Moon. So Rohini (4th) = Moon.

explanation.gu: Rohini is the 4th nakshatra, ruled by Moon in the Vimshottari scheme. The sequence: 1-Ketu, 2-Venus, 3-Sun, 4-Moon. So Rohini (4th) = Moon.
explanation.mai: रोहिणी ४म नक्षत्र अछि, विंशोत्तरी योजना मे चंद्र द्वारा शासित. क्रम: १-केतु, २-शुक्र, ३-सूर्य, ४-चंद्र. ताहि लेल रोहिणी (४म) = चंद्र.

question.en: The Vimshottari dasha sequence repeats after every 3 rounds of the 9-nakshatra lord cycle through all 27 nakshatras.
question.hi: विंशोत्तरी दशा अनुक्रम सभी 27 नक्षत्रों में 9-नक्षत्र स्वामी चक्र के प्रत्येक 3 आवृत्तियों के बाद दोहराता है।
question.ta: The Vimshottari dasha sequence repeats after every 3 rounds of the 9-nakshatra lord cycle through all 27 nakshatras.
question.te: The Vimshottari dasha sequence repeats after every 3 rounds of the 9-nakshatra lord cycle through all 27 nakshatras.
question.bn: The Vimshottari dasha sequence repeats after every 3 rounds of the 9-nakshatra lord cycle through all 27 nakshatras.
question.kn: The Vimshottari dasha sequence repeats after every 3 rounds of the 9-nakshatra lord cycle through all 27 nakshatras.
question.mr: विंशोत्तरी दशा अनुक्रम सभी 27 नक्षत्रों में 9-नक्षत्र स्वामी चक्र के प्रत्येक 3 आवृत्तियों के बाद दोहराता है।
question.gu: The Vimshottari dasha sequence repeats after every 3 rounds of the 9-nakshatra lord cycle through all 27 nakshatras.
question.mai: विंशोत्तरी दशा क्रम सभ २७ नक्षत्रक माध्यम सँ ९-नक्षत्र स्वामी चक्रक प्रत्येक ३ चक्रक बाद दोहराओल जाइत अछि.

explanation.en: True. The 9-planet lord sequence cycles 3 times to cover all 27 nakshatras (9 x 3 = 27). Ketu rules 1, 10, 19; Venus rules 2, 11, 20; and so on.
explanation.hi: सत्य। 9-ग्रह स्वामी अनुक्रम सभी 27 नक्षत्रों को आवृत करने हेतु 3 बार चक्रित होता है (9 x 3 = 27)। केतु 1, 10, 19 का शासक; शुक्र 2, 11, 20 का; इसी प्रकार।
explanation.ta: True. The 9-planet lord sequence cycles 3 times to cover all 27 nakshatras (9 x 3 = 27). Ketu rules 1, 10, 19; Venus rules 2, 11, 20; and so on.

explanation.gu: True. The 9-planet lord sequence cycles 3 times to cover all 27 nakshatras (9 x 3 = 27). Ketu rules 1, 10, 19; Venus rules 2, 11, 20; and so on.
explanation.mai: सत्य. ९-ग्रह स्वामी क्रम सभ २७ नक्षत्रक कवर करबाक लेल ३ बेर चक्रित होइत अछि (९ x ३ = २७). केतु १, १०, १९ क स्वामी अछि; शुक्र २, ११, २० क स्वामी अछि; आ एहिना.

explanation.en: Elapsed = 54.75%. Remaining = 1 - 0.5475 = 0.4525. Moon dasha = 10 years. Remaining = 10 x 0.4525 = 4.525 ≈ 4.53 years. After this, Mars dasha (7 years) begins.
